title: SimplyCraft
description: A pack that takes the overwhelming textures of Minecraft and simplifies them to be easier on the eyes!
body: Down to its very core, the idea of SimplyCraft is to allow people to experience Minecraft in a way that most other packs don't allow. Focusing on duller and easier to view colors, it allows people of any background to see what Minecraft has to offer without taking away from the core soul of the textures themselves. Overall, this resource pack aims to make the textures of Minecraft simpler to view for all players without taking away the color pallet or idea of the textures changed within the pack. Offical texturepack of ThatGravyBoat <3
